form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.75 len at this track February 19 over 1200m defeating Elite Golf carrying 58kg at $6. Second-up made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 13 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Absolute Heart carrying 61kg at $1.70. Sure to go close.
